ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_number" TEXT /* Roll number assigned to the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the student enrolled */,
  "demographic_information" TEXT /* Additional demographic information (e.g., gender, date of birth, address) */,
  "program" TEXT /* The academic program or major of the student */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* The current semester the student is in */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic adviser assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code representing the subject (e.g., ADS, PDV) */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subject */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits assigned to the subject */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of subject IDs that are prerequisites for the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the subject */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department that offers the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student obtaining the grade */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject in which the grade was obtained */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Numerical grade received by the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* The semester in which the grade was obtained */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* The type of grade (e.g., midterm, final, project) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The weight of the grade in the overall course grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semester ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the class */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject for which attendance is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* The semester in which the attendance is recorded */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* The classroom where the class is held */,
  "class_start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the class */,
  "class_end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semester ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offered */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty teaching the course */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* The classroom where the course is held */,
  "class_start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the class */,
  "class_end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the class */,
  "class_days" TEXT /* The days of the week the class is held (e.g., MWF for Monday, Wednesday, Friday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member works */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the faculty member (e.g., Assistant Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the faculty member's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "overall_grade" INTEGER /* Overall grade calculated for the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* The semester for which the report is generated */,
  "gpa" REAL /* The grade point average of the student */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* A plan for improvement if the student's performance is below a certain threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semester ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which feedback is provided */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text feedback from the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5 scale) */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* The semester in which the feedback was provided */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* The date when the feedback was provided */,
  "course_evaluation" TEXT /* A detailed evaluation of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semester ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "building" TEXT /* The building where the department is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* The contact email of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the classroom */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department that the classroom belongs to */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* A list of equipment available in the classroom (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classrooms_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semester" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "current" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the semester is currently active */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the semester (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)
